name: PARKER-HANNIFIN CORPORATION
assignment_basis: [OVERRIDE of NAICS-default 11] Carson CA Water Purification / Village Marine RO desalination-watermaker OEM = naval water-treatment fluid system, not commercial/service machinery.
Primary NAICS Description: Commercial and Service Industry Machinery Manufacturing
What They Make or Do: Parker's Carson, CA Water Purification / Racor-Village Marine Tec operation: designs, builds, tests, supports MIL-SPEC reverse-osmosis desalination/watermaker systems (potable & reactor-grade water) for Navy surface ships, submarines, carriers; plus spares, technical assistance, repair.
Primary Products or Capabilities: MIL-SPEC reverse-osmosis desalination/watermaker systems; potable & reactor-grade water systems; spares; system repair.
Verified Ultimate Owner: Parker-Hannifin Corporation, NYSE: PH (public; no higher parent)
Operating Entity / Site Note: UEI is the Carson, CA Water Purification / Racor-Village Marine Tec establishment, not a generic Parker machinery site.
NAICS Assessment: MISLEADING - 333310 'Commercial & Service Industry Machinery' is too generic; obscures the naval desalination-system OEM role; not HVAC/service machinery.
Verification Notes / Uncertainty: Operating site & naval desalination role established by Parker MIL-SPEC RO literature, SAM, USAspending; subaward-line content not inferred.

name: ALFA LAVAL INC.
assignment_basis: NAICS-default 04 (heat exchangers) holds; 03/04 boundary vendor - also separators, filtration, pumps, valves, marine pumping (03). Heat-transfer kept primary.
Primary NAICS Description: Power Boiler and Heat Exchanger Manufacturing
What They Make or Do: U.S. Alfa Laval entity: heat exchangers, centrifugal separators/decanters, filters/strainers/membranes, pumps, valves, marine pumping systems + parts/service. Naval outputs = heat-transfer, liquid-separation, fluid-handling.
Primary Products or Capabilities: Heat exchangers; centrifugal separators/decanters; filtration; pumps; valves; marine pumping systems.
Verified Corporate Parent: Alfa Laval AB (publ), Lund, Sweden (100% owner)
Verified Ultimate Owner: Alfa Laval AB public shareholders, Nasdaq Stockholm (Winder Holding AG 29.53%, not majority)
Operating Entity / Site Note: U.S. corporation under Swedish ultimate parent.
NAICS Assessment: ACCURATE but INCOMPLETE - 332410 describes the heat-exchanger line (not misleading) but omits separators, filtration, pumps, valves, marine pumping.
Verification Notes / Uncertainty: Products/ownership from Alfa Laval pages + 2025 annual report; subaward content not inferred.

name: AIRCRAFT APPLIANCES AND EQUIPMENT LIMITED
assignment_basis: [OVERRIDE of NAICS-default 05] Marine fuel/lube-oil filtration & separation systems = fluid system, not metal tanks.
What They Make or Do: Mississauga operation, now Trident Maritime Systems Canada: bespoke marine fuel- & lube-oil filtration/separation systems (diesel pre-filter coalescers, AVCAT filter-separators), specialized valves/actuators, aviation-support equipment, component overhaul; filtration installed broadly across USN fleet.
Primary Products or Capabilities: Marine fuel/lube-oil filtration & separation systems; filter-separators; specialized valves/actuators.
Verified Corporate Parent: Lake Shore Systems, Inc. (AAE transferred 2025-03-01); group: Trident Maritime Systems
Verified Ultimate Owner: Funds managed by J.F. Lehman & Company (Trident a current JFLCO portfolio company)
Operating Entity / Site Note: Canadian legal entity & manufacturing operation; U.S. PE-controlled group; trades as Trident Maritime Systems Canada.
NAICS Assessment: MISLEADING - 332420 'Metal Tank Mfg' understates engineered naval filtration/separation systems (proprietary internals, qualification, testing, integration).
Verification Notes / Uncertainty: Identity/ownership from SAM, Trident materials, Companies House accounts, JFLCO portfolio; ownership transfer dated 2025-03-01.

name: YOUNG ENGINEERING & MANUFACTURING, INC.
assignment_basis: NAICS-default 05 holds: bladder surge tanks / pulsation dampeners are ASME pressure vessels (process = pressure-vessel mfg; fluid-system function noted).
What They Make or Do: Designs/builds pressure-vessel-based fluid-energy & hydraulic-transient control equipment: bladder surge tanks, surge arrestors, pulsation dampeners, related pressure vessels. ASME Sec VIII, NAVSEA Level I/SUBSAFE; used aboard nuclear submarines.
Primary Products or Capabilities: Bladder surge tanks; surge arrestors; pulsation dampeners; ASME pressure vessels.
Verified Ultimate Owner: Not publicly verified (Winston B. Young founded 1987; current beneficial ownership unconfirmed)
Operating Entity / Site Note: U.S. corporation & facilities; ownership control not publicly disclosed.
NAICS Assessment: ACCURATE - 332420; heavy-gauge pressure vessels are the physical product & central process.
Verification Notes / Uncertainty: Capability high-confidence (SAM + company site); beneficial ownership unverified.

name: INDEECO LLC
assignment_basis: NAICS-default 04 holds: engineered electric heating equipment. (HII thermal/fluid boundary explains low SWBS agreement; process classification 04 correct.)
Primary NAICS Description: Heating Equipment (except Warm Air Furnaces) Manufacturing
What They Make or Do: Vertically integrated maker of engineered electric-heating/thermal-management equipment: immersion heaters, circulation/in-line process heaters, process-air heaters, tubular elements, marine heaters, SCR/step controls, control panels; ASME pressure-vessel heater packages.
Primary Products or Capabilities: Immersion/process/marine electric heaters; tubular heating elements; SCR/step controls & panels.
Operating Entity / Site Note: U.S. entity; immediate legal holding between INDEECO and SPX not separately specified in cited materials.
NAICS Assessment: ACCURATE - 333414 'Heating Equipment Mfg' directly describes the output; heating flowing fluids does not make it a piping supplier.
Verification Notes / Uncertainty: Products/parent from INDEECO site, ASPEQ/SPX acquisition release, SPX SEC subsidiary exhibit.
